## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why this change is needed.

## Verification

List the exact automated and manual checks you ran, including relevant environments.

## Screenshots or samples

Add before/after screenshots or synthetic ASCII fixtures for visual changes. Do not include private source material.

## Risk and rollout

Describe compatibility, migration, privacy, security, performance, and rollback considerations. Write `None` only after reviewing each category.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated generated or local files.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior and failure paths.
- [ ] I ran `npm audit --audit-level=moderate` when JavaScript dependencies changed.
- [ ] I updated public docs, examples, configuration, and third-party notices where needed.
- [ ] I preserved Diagram IR and API compatibility or documented a deliberate breaking change.
- [ ] Logs, fixtures, screenshots, and commits contain no secrets, personal data, private transcripts, or proprietary code.
- [ ] User-facing interactions were reviewed for keyboard access, focus, readable contrast, and error recovery.
- [ ] Deployment changes include migration, health, rollback, and least-privilege considerations.
